sections.paragraph:
adj. m., constr. יְפֵה; f. יָפָה constr. יְפַת-

(1) fair, beautiful, used of persons, both men and women, Gen 12:14 2Sa 13:1 14:25 Son 1:8 5:9 often with the addition of מַרְאֶה 1Sa 17:42 or תֹּאַר Gen 29:17 also used of animals, 41:2 , seq.; of pleasant countries, Psa 48:3 of a pleasant tuneful voice, Eze 33:32.

(2) good, excellent, καλός. Ecc 3:11, “God made all things beautiful;” καλῶς, 5:17 .
